title: Schindleria rosea-aenea
taxonomy: Schindleria rosea-aenea is classified as a species of fish in the family Schindleriidae. This family is a part of the order Perciformes, which is a large and diverse order of fish. Schindleria rosea-aenea is also classified as a member of the class Actinopterygii, which includes all ray-finned fish. Additionally, it belongs to the kingdom Animalia and the phylum Chordata. Its classification is further detailed in the scientific name, Schindleria rosea-aenea.
